[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111110 6
1 1001010 3
2 0000010 1
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 1100101 4
7 1101110 5

01 10 1100100 3
12 21 0001010 2
23 32 0001010 2
34 43 1000000 1
45 54 1010000 2
56 65 1001010 3 match 1
67 76 0000010 1 match 2
70 07 0000000 a match 3 4 5

02 20 0000000 a match 3 4 5
13 31 1001110 4
24 42 0000000 a match 3 4 5
35 53 1001110 4
46 64 1000000 1
57 75 0000010 1 match 2
60 06 1000000 1
71 17 0000010 1 match 2

14 41 1000000 1

36 63 1001010 3 match 1
47 74 0000000 a match 3 4 5
50 05 1100100 3
61 16 1001010 3 match 1
72 27 0000010 1 match 2

15 51 1101110 5 match 7
26 62 0001010 2
